title: No Fishing Rod
description: This mod removes all fishing rods from Minecraft, so you can’t craft them or use them to fish, reel mobs, or trigger redstone tricks anymore.
body: No Fishing Rod deletes the fishing rod item, its crafting recipe, and all loot that normally gives one. You can’t fish for treasure, food, or enchantments, and you can’t use rods to pull mobs or activate special mechanics like AFK fish farms. Villagers won’t trade them, enchanted rods won’t appear, and fishing becomes completely impossible. It forces players to find new ways to get food, gear, and rare items normally obtained through fishing. It’s a small change that removes several shortcuts and makes survival more hands-on.
